name: Abandoned Building
description: A merchant's house gone derelict a generation ago, when its owner walked into the cellar and never came back out. The shutters still hang on their hinges; nothing else inside is willing to.

name: Sea Shrine
description: A four-tiered temple cut into a sea-stack on the western coast, raised to the Suns of the old Conclave. Its lowest citadel was flooded long before the dragon woke — by design, not accident. What was hidden there was hidden from the dragon itself.
